overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through the University of San Andreas campus. The character traverses covered walkways, open courtyards with fountains, passes tennis courts, interacts with a group of students on a lawn, and continues along a sidewalk near a street. The environment features brick buildings, manicured landscaping, and clear sunny weather.

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered colonnade toward a group of three people standing ahead

notable_agents.action: three people standing together in conversation at the end of the walkway

entered.detail: concrete overhang providing shade over the walkway
smooth stucco wall with ventilation grilles
large brick building with horizontal stripes visible in the distance
support column for the covered walkway roof
raised brick planter with green shrubs and purple flowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered walkway with tiled flooring, flanked by a beige building on the left and planters on the right. The camera approaches three NPCs standing at the end of the colonnade before transitioning into an open courtyard area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open campus courtyard with central fountain

events.description: enters the open courtyard from the covered walkway, revealing the fountain and grass lawns
passes the group of three NPCs and continues toward the pathway alongside the building

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit courtyard, passing the group of three people on the right side

entered.detail: stone wall with 'TRAINING CENTER' carved into it
circular concrete fountain structure with water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright courtyard with the Training Center building on the left and a fountain ahead. The character walks past the group of NPCs and continues along the tiled path, with the building's ivy-covered walls becoming visible.

events.description: moves from open courtyard into narrow pathway with tennis courts visible through fence

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow pathway beside the ivy-covered brick building, passing the fenced tennis courts on the left

entered.detail: brick wall covered in dense green ivy and flowering plants at the base
tall chain-link fence surrounding the tennis courts
green hardcourt tennis surface with white lines
grassy hillside with trees in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrower path with an ivy-covered brick wall on the left and fenced tennis courts visible through the chain-link. The environment becomes more enclosed with dense vegetation, transitioning toward a grassy area with a gazebo in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy lawn area with students relaxing

events.description: leaves the paved path and walks onto the grass toward a group of people
circles around the group of four people relaxing on the lawn

agents.ego_description: walking onto the grass lawn toward a group of four people, then circling around them before returning to the path

notable_agents.action: group of four people socializing, with two sitting on the grass and two standing nearby

entered.detail: wooden pergola structure with benches in the distance
mature tree with spreading canopy providing shade

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grassy lawn area and approaches a group of four students relaxing near a large tree. After circling the group, the character continues past them toward a pathway running alongside the building, with a gazebo visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along campus building adjacent to street

events.description: returns to paved sidewalk from the grassy lawn area
yellow taxi cab drives past on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the Training Center building, passing a person standing near the entrance as a taxi drives by

notable_agents.action: person standing near the building entrance looking at their phone

entered.detail: asphalt road with vehicles passing by
ornate black lamppost along the pathway
glass door entrance to the Training Center building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk next to the Training Center building, approaching the street level. A yellow taxi passes by on the road to the left, while a pedestrian stands near the building entrance on the right. The pathway continues alongside the brick building toward the street intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a university campus that transitions from a sheltered walkway into open courtyards and eventually toward a busy street. It begins along a tiled colonnade flanked by a beige building and planters, moving forward until the space opens into a bright courtyard featuring a fountain and the ivy-covered walls of the Training Center. As the character passes a group of NPCs, the path narrows beside a chain-link fence bordering tennis courts and dense vegetation before expanding once more into a grassy lawn. The camera then circles a group of students relaxing under a large tree, moving past a distant gazebo toward a sidewalk that runs alongside the brick architecture. Finally, the scene shifts toward the street level as a yellow taxi passes by and the pathway leads toward a road intersection.
